## Verify when done
Mirror the spec's checklist (CI enforces typecheck · lint · test):

- [ ] Behavioural condition(s) from the spec met
- [ ] `pnpm -w typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -w lint` clean
- [ ] `pnpm -w test` passes
- [ ] No invariant in `context/architecture.md` violated
- [ ] Context files updated if scope/architecture/standards changed (`progress-tracker.md` always)
